User.title: User Profile
User.description: Information related to a user's account.

Project.title: Research Project
Project.description: Holds the conversation history, sources, and queries for a unique user research project.

userId.description: The user owning this research project

depth.description: Whether quick indexing or deep logical exploration

messages.description: Historical message logs between user and Lilbed AI

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp or formatted date string

Profile.title: Social Profile
Profile.description: WhatsApp and scholar collaborative social directory profiles.

uid.description: The user ID of the registered scholar

isPremium.description: Whether the user holds premium video and checkout licensing

TokPost.title: Lilbed Tok Post
TokPost.description: Interactive video posts representing the TikTok-styled scholar reels feed.

/users/{userId}.description: User profile isolation containing personal identification info.

/projects/{projectId}.description: User research reports, isolated dynamically via owner userId mapping.

/profiles/{profileId}.description: Scholar and WhatsApp directories, read accessible to any signed-in user.

/toks/{tokId}.description: Public short video posts, read accessible by everyone and writeable by signed-in premium users.
